name: Marshmallow Chicks and Bunnies
recipeIngredient: 1 bag chocolate chips (6 ounces), melted with 1 tsp. vegetable shortening
1 cup sugar, tinted with food coloring
1/2 cup freshly grated or canned coconut
recipeInstructions:
1. Over medium-low heat, melt marshmallows, stirring constantly.
2. When the mixture is melted, pour it into molds or open cookie cutters that have been sprayed with vegetable spray and lightly dusted with cornstarch.
3. If using sugar, coconut, nuts, or mini-morsels, sprinkle them on top of the mixture immediately.
4. Allow the mixtures to firm slightly, then remove from molds or cutters and roll in more of the coating.
5. If dipping, allow marshmallows to cool completely before dipping.
6. To dip: Melt chocolate pieces with vegetable shortening in a shallow dish in the microwave on 50 percent power for 4 minutes, stirring as needed. Remove and keep mixture warm over bowl of hot water. Dip marshmallows one at a time, using a fork to allow the mixture to drip back into the bowl. Dry until set on a wire rack.
7. Makes 16 2-inch figures.
